title: Software Update - Headset and all components have update available - UI
scenario: Software Update UI fails to display "Update All" button and individual component sections for headsets with charge stand or earbuds with charge case when all components have updates available
steps: Tap on a connected headset (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200, Poly Free 60+) to open Device Settings
Tap on the Software Update tab
Observe the displayed firmware version information
If the headset has a charge stand or earbuds have a charge case, check for an 'Update All' button
Check for individual update sections for each component (headset, charge stand/case, etc.)
If a component does not support DFU via mobile, verify a note is shown directing the user to update via the PC app
expected: The Software Update tab displays the current firmware version, the latest available firmware version as a link to release notes, and an Update button. For headsets with a charge stand or earbuds with a charge case, an 'Update All' button appears along with individual update sections for each component. Components that do not support DFU via mobile show a note directing the user to update via the PC app.
